# Support

## Where to Ask

- Bugs: GitHub Issues (use bug report template)
- Features: GitHub Issues (use feature request template)
- Usage questions: GitHub Discussions (when enabled)

## What to Include

- macOS version
- DJAMP PRO version or commit SHA
- Logs/screenshots
- Exact error message
- Steps to reproduce

## Not Supported

- Production deployment support
- Private custom consulting requests
